# solidfire_account (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "solidfire_account" "k8s_account" {
  account_id = 123
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `account_id` (Number)
- `username` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `initiator_secret` (String, Sensitive)
- `status` (String)
- `target_secret` (String, Sensitive)
